name: Quiz generator based on excel defined data - version for sharing

parameters.content:
## Quiz generator based on excel  defined data

### How it works

This workflow generates quiz content from data defined in an Excel-like Google Sheet and user input received through chat. A chat message triggers a conditional branch that either fetches and formats spreadsheet rows or sends the message onward, then the AI agent uses the available data to produce the quiz response. The agent is supported by a Groq chat model and simple memory to maintain short conversational context.

### Setup steps

- Configure the chat trigger so users can send quiz-generation requests to the workflow.
- Connect Google Sheets credentials and select the spreadsheet, sheet, and row range containing the quiz source data.
- Verify the JavaScript code matches the column names and structure of the sheet data you want to pass to the AI agent.
- Add Groq credentials and choose the desired chat model for the AI Agent.
- Review the If node condition so it correctly decides when to fetch sheet data versus using the chat input directly.

### Customization

You can customize the spreadsheet schema, the JavaScript row extraction logic, the If condition, and the AI Agent instructions to control quiz format, difficulty, number of questions, and output style.

## Receive and route chat

Starts when a chat message arrives, then evaluates a condition to decide whether to fetch quiz data from the sheet or send the request directly to the AI agent.

## Load quiz data

Retrieves rows from Google Sheets and uses JavaScript to extract or reshape the spreadsheet rows into JSON for downstream quiz generation.

For safety reasons I delted excel link, hence for workflow to work you need to:
1. Setup connection to your google drive
2. Provide url to your data sheets where in column A will be english words and in column B their meaning(for me it's polish)
3. In from list you need to choose "from list" and choose sheet, if you cannot see it you may need to grant bigger permissions to your drive
4. Define filters:
Specify range (A1  Notation) with Ranbe A1:B

## Generate quiz response

Uses the prepared sheet data or routed chat input to generate the quiz response with an AI agent, backed by a Groq chat model and simple conversation memory.

parameters.text:
={{ $('When chat message received').item.json.chatInput }} send me list of english words and phrases you get from {{ $input.all().map(item => item.json).toJsonString() }}. Next I will be guessing what is their polish meaning from code you got. Guessing part takes place until new message will get "Generate" in the prompt. After correct guess present both english and polish meaning. If I guess wrong try to give me suggestion before giving me an answer. If user ask you for suggestion don't give it the answer but try to explain what the word mean. If user provide inccorect answer don't give correct answer until explicitly asked for. Don't generate new list of words untill I explicitly ask for it.
Don't mark as answered words I guesd wrongly or those for which correct answer was asked for.

Always present list of words that were answered with proper information and those that still waits to be answered
